'''Bruiser''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] criminal who lived during the final years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
A prisoner exiled to [[Kiffex/Legends|Kiffex]], he was hired by [[Gorto Zaga]] to defend the local settlement's walls against the attacking [[Anzat (species)|Anzati]]. His standing orders were to shoot anyone who tried to enter at night; as a result, he attempted to kill the [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] [[Vilmarh Grahrk]] and his [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] companions. After entering the city, [[Tholme/Legends|Tholme]] used a [[Mind trick/Legends|mind trick]], causing Bruiser to forget the affair entirely.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars (1998) 33|''Star Wars'' (1998) 33]] {{1st}}
